title: Heavy Machinery – Actual engine operation

sql.statement: WITH rpm_bounds AS (SELECT 800::int AS light_lo, 1100::int AS light_hi, 1101::int AS med_lo, 1650::int AS med_hi, 1651::int AS heavy_lo, 2200::int AS heavy_hi), points AS (SELECT i.device_id FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd ON i.device_id = sd.device_id AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label WHERE sd.sensor_id IS NOT NULL AND (sd.sensor_type = 'rpm' OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.sensor_units,'')) LIKE '%rpm%') AND i.device_time >= now() - interval '1 day'), classified AS (SELECT p.device_id FROM points p CROSS JOIN rpm_bounds b) SELECT ROUND((COUNT(*) * 5.0/60.0)::numeric, 1) AS value FROM classified c JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = c.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits WHERE enter_time >= now() - interval '1 day'

WITH inputs AS (
  SELECT
    i.device_id,
    i.device_time,
    i.sensor_name,
    i.value::float AS val
  FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
  WHERE i.device_time >= now() - interval '1 day'
),
temp_readings AS (
  SELECT
    i.device_id,
    (i.val / NULLIF(sd.divider, 0)) * sd.multiplier AS temp_c
  FROM inputs i
  JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd
    ON i.device_id = sd.device_id
   AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
  WHERE sd.sensor_type = 'temperature'
     OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.input_label, '')) LIKE '%temp%'
),
by_object AS (
  SELECT o.object_id
  FROM temp_readings t
  JOIN raw_business_data.objects o
    ON o.device_id = t.device_id
   AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
  GROUP BY o.object_id
  HAVING MAX(t.temp_c) > 95
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM by_object;

WITH time_classified_tracks AS (SELECT t.track_distance_meters, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM t.track_start_time) IN (0, 6) THEN 'weekend' WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_start_time) BETWEEN 9 AND 18 THEN 'authorized' ELSE 'unauthorized' END AS time_category FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= now() - interval '1 day') SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(track_distance_meters)/1000.0, 0), 0)::bigint AS value FROM time_classified_tracks WHERE time_category = 'unauthorized'

WITH time_classified_tracks AS (SELECT t.device_id, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM t.track_start_time) IN (0, 6) THEN 'weekend_usage' WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_start_time) BETWEEN 9 AND 18 THEN 'authorized_work_time' ELSE 'unauthorized_non_work_time' END AS time_category, t.track_distance_meters FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= now() - interval '30 days') SELECT time_category AS category, ROUND(SUM(track_distance_meters)/1000.0, 0) AS value FROM time_classified_tracks GROUP BY time_category ORDER BY time_category

WITH rpm_bounds AS (
    SELECT
        800::int  AS light_lo,
        1100::int AS light_hi,
        1101::int AS med_lo,
        1650::int AS med_hi,
        1651::int AS heavy_lo,
        2200::int AS heavy_hi
),

points AS (
    SELECT
        i.device_id,
        i.device_time,
        COALESCE(
            (i.value::FLOAT / NULLIF(sd.divider, 0)) * sd.multiplier,
            i.value::FLOAT
        ) AS rpm
    FROM raw_telematics_data.inputs i
    JOIN raw_business_data.sensor_description sd
        ON i.device_id = sd.device_id
       AND i.sensor_name = sd.input_label
    WHERE sd.sensor_id IS NOT NULL
      AND (
            sd.sensor_type = 'rpm'
         OR LOWER(COALESCE(sd.sensor_units, '')) LIKE '%rpm%'
      )
      AND i.device_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
),

classified AS (
    SELECT
        p.device_id,
        CASE
            WHEN p.rpm BETWEEN b.light_lo AND b.light_hi THEN 'LIGHT'
            WHEN p.rpm BETWEEN b.med_lo AND b.med_hi THEN 'MEDIUM'
            WHEN p.rpm BETWEEN b.heavy_lo AND b.heavy_hi THEN 'HEAVY'
            ELSE 'OTHER'
        END AS load_band
    FROM points p
    CROSS JOIN rpm_bounds b
),

by_object_band AS (
    SELECT
        o.object_label,
        c.load_band,
        COUNT(*) * 5.0 / 60.0 AS hours_est
    FROM classified c
    JOIN raw_business_data.objects o
        ON o.device_id = c.device_id
       AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE
    GROUP BY
        o.object_label,
        c.load_band
)

SELECT
    COALESCE(object_label, 'Unknown') AS category,
    ROUND(SUM(hours_est)::numeric, 2) AS value,
    load_band AS series
FROM by_object_band
GROUP BY
    object_label,
    load_band
ORDER BY
    category,
    series
LIMIT 500;

SELECT COALESCE(zg.zone_label, 'Unknown') AS category, COUNT(*)::bigint AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits zv LEFT JOIN business_data.zones_geom zg ON zg.zone_id = zv.zone_id WHERE zv.enter_time >= now() - interval '7 days' GROUP BY zg.zone_label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT o.object_label AS category,  COUNT(*)::bigint AS value, 'trips' AS series  
FROM business_data.tracks t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE 
WHERE t.track_start_time >= now() - interval '1 day' 
GROUP BY o.object_label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT o.object_label AS category, ROUND(SUM(t.track_distance_meters)/1000.0, 1)::numeric AS value,  'km' AS series 
FROM business_data.tracks t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE 
WHERE t.track_start_time >= now() - interval '1 day' 
GROUP BY o.object_label ORDER BY value DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50

SELECT o.object_label, zg.zone_label, zv.enter_time, zv.exit_time, trim(leading '0' from to_char(interval '0' + zv.duration, 'HH24:MI:SS')) AS duration 
FROM business_data.zone_visits zv 
JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE LEFT JOIN business_data.zones_geom zg ON zg.zone_id = zv.zone_id 
WHERE zv.enter_time >= now() - interval '7 days'  
ORDER BY zv.enter_time DESC LIMIT 20

description: Workload, usage by time, zone visits, overheating, operator scoring. Idle (ignition ON, engine OFF) excluded — no data in current dataset.
